# Writing Plans

This is the Codex adapter for the canonical Claude capability at
`.claude/skills/writing-plans/SKILL.md`.

When this skill is selected:

1. Resolve the repository root with `git rev-parse --show-toplevel`.
2. Read `<repo>/.agents/CODEX_COMPATIBILITY.md` completely.
3. Read `<repo>/.claude/skills/writing-plans/SKILL.md` completely, including any referenced files needed for the task.
4. Follow the same workflow order, approval gates, safety rules, and verification requirements.
5. Treat text after `$writing-plans` as the canonical command's arguments when applicable.
6. Translate only platform surfaces; do not change canonical behavior or silently skip steps.
7. Do not edit the canonical source merely to make Codex execute it.
